name: Tadross Law
description_short: Tadross Law is a credit repair provider based in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania. Rated 5.0/5 with 134 Google reviews, reflecting exceptional customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Tadross Law is a credit repair provider serving clients in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania. With 134 Google reviews and a 5.0/5.0 rating, Tadross Law has built a significant presence in the local credit repair market.

Operating as a bankruptcy attorney, Tadross Law provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit repair solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Philadelphia, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Tadross Law operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Philadelphia, Pennsylvania area who are considering Tadross Law should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.
